name: Lumigo
description: Lumigo serverless and microservices monitoring platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Lumigo
2. Go to Settings → Token
3. Copy your API token
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Lumigo → Settings → Token → Copy your token
